case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MORFFET, ALFRED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,912.26 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MORFFET, ALFRED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
